text: "Honestly, the big things for me are clarity and structure — I want headers, I want the reader to be able to scan and know where they are. I'll throw in code examples wherever they help, because prose can only take you so far. I write assuming the person reading is a competent engineer, just not someone who's touched this particular system before, so I'm not hand-holding but I am giving full context. The goal is always that someone can actually use what I wrote, not just read it."
